projects.title: Client-Agent Chat Platform (MERN + Socket.io)
projects.description: Built a real-time client-agent chat app used to simulate component-based support systems, improving agent workflow visibility via a dedicated dashboard. Engineered agent dashboard with message logs, dynamic assignments, and chat controls. Used React.js (frontend), Node.js & Express (backend), and Socket.io for bidirectional messaging.

projects.title: Online Code Editor (MERN Stack + Monaco Editor)
projects.description: Developed a MERN stack-based code editor. The editor supports syntax highlighting, real-time collaboration, and multiple language execution. Optimized performance by implementing efficient code execution workflows. Tech Stack: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, Monaco Editor, Compilex.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website (React + Vercel)
projects.description: Architected a responsive portfolio using modern UI frameworks; optimized for speed and SEO. Deployed on Vercel to showcase projects and contact details interactively.

experience.title: SCSS Framework & Limitless CSS Migration
experience.description: Built a modular SCSS framework and migrated Limitless CSS to version 4.0. Enhanced scalability, responsiveness, and cross-browser compatibility.

experience.title: UI/UX & Web Design Intern
experience.description: Designed and delivered scalable UI components using Bootstrap 5 and Figma. Built and shipped 20+ reusable React.js components, accelerating feature delivery by 30% and reducing code duplication. Participated in Agile sprints and iterative user testing cycles.
